# plyr.fm

> audio streaming platform built on the AT Protocol (ATProto). users own their audio data in personal data servers (PDS). open API, Python SDK, and MCP server for integrations.

## docs

- [for listeners](https://docs.plyr.fm/listeners/): sign in with your handle, stream tracks, build playlists, leave timed comments
- [for artists](https://docs.plyr.fm/artists/): upload tracks, embed players, supporter-gated content, oEmbed support
- [developer overview](https://docs.plyr.fm/developers/): Python SDK, MCP server, architecture overview
- [developer quickstart](https://docs.plyr.fm/developers/quickstart/): build a track player in 30 lines with the plyrfm SDK
- [API reference](https://docs.plyr.fm/developers/api-reference/): REST API endpoints, request/response examples, error codes, pagination
- [authentication](https://docs.plyr.fm/developers/auth/): ATProto OAuth 2.1 flow, developer tokens, scoped requests
- [lexicons overview](https://docs.plyr.fm/lexicons/overview/): ATProto record schemas (fm.plyr.track, fm.plyr.like, fm.plyr.comment, fm.plyr.list, fm.plyr.actor.profile)
- [troubleshooting](https://docs.plyr.fm/troubleshooting/): common issues with auth, uploads, playback, embeds, PDS sync
- [glossary](https://docs.plyr.fm/glossary/): ATProto and plyr.fm terminology
- [contributing](https://docs.plyr.fm/contributing/): fork workflow, prerequisites, dev commands

## API

- [OpenAPI spec](https://api.plyr.fm/docs): interactive API documentation
- Base URL: `https://api.plyr.fm`
- Auth: Bearer token via developer tokens from [plyr.fm/portal](https://plyr.fm/portal)
- Public endpoints (no auth): search, list tracks, stream audio, stats, oEmbed, RSS feeds
- Authenticated endpoints: upload, like, comment, playlist management, account settings

## SDK

- Python SDK: `uv add plyrfm` ([GitHub](https://github.com/zzstoatzz/plyr-python-client))
- MCP server: `uvx plyrfm-mcp` (tools: search, list_tracks, top_tracks, tracks_by_tag, get_track, liked_tracks, my_tracks)

## ATProto namespace

- Production: `fm.plyr` (e.g. `fm.plyr.track`)
- Staging: `fm.plyr.stg`
- Development: `fm.plyr.dev`
- NSIDs are reverse-DNS format, NOT URLs
- Lexicon JSON schemas: `/lexicons/` directory in the repository

## key URLs

- App: https://plyr.fm
- API: https://api.plyr.fm
- Docs: https://docs.plyr.fm
- Staging: https://stg.plyr.fm / https://api-stg.plyr.fm
- Source: https://github.com/zzstoatzz/plyr.fm
